Bash(python3 -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\('/mnt/c/Projects/classmoney/docs/info/07-api-design/openAPI.json'\)\); paths=list\(data['paths'].keys\(\)\); print\('Total paths:', len\(paths\)\); [print\(p\) for p in paths if p not in ['/api/auth/login','/api/auth/activate','/api/auth/refresh','/api/institutions','/api/institutions/{institutionId}','/api/institutions/{institutionId}/class-groups','/api/class-groups/{classGroupId}','/api/class-groups/{classGroupId}/balance','/api/class-groups/{classGroupId}/treasurers','/api/class-groups/{classGroupId}/treasurers/{treasurerId}','/api/users','/api/users/{userId}','/api/class-groups/{classGroupId}/children','/api/class-groups/{classGroupId}/children/with-balance','/api/children/{childId}','/api/children/{childId}/balance','/api/children/{childId}/parents','/api/children/{childId}/parents/{parentId}','/api/children/{childId}/transactions','/api/child-transactions/{transactionId}','/api/class-groups/{classGroupId}/expenses','/api/expenses/{expenseId}','/api/parents/me/children','/api/me/children/{childId}/balance','/api/me/children/{childId}/transactions']]; schemas=list\(data['components']['schemas'].keys\(\)\); print\('New schemas:', [s for s in schemas if s in ['LogoutRequest','ChangePasswordRequest','ParentDto']]\)")
